title: Resilience4j Circuit Breaker Configuration
description: JSON Schema for Resilience4j circuit breaker configuration properties used in application.yml or application.properties.

slidingWindowType.description: Type of sliding window used to record calls.

minimumNumberOfCalls.description: Minimum number of calls before the circuit breaker can calculate the error rate.

failureRateThreshold.description: Failure rate threshold in percentage above which the circuit breaker opens.

slowCallRateThreshold.description: Slow call rate threshold in percentage.

slowCallDurationThreshold.description: Duration threshold above which a call is considered slow.

waitDurationInOpenState.description: Duration the circuit breaker stays open before transitioning to half-open.

permittedNumberOfCallsInHalfOpenState.description: Number of permitted calls in half-open state.

automaticTransitionFromOpenToHalfOpenEna.description: Whether to automatically transition from open to half-open.

recordExceptions.description: List of exception class names that are recorded as failures.

ignoreExceptions.description: List of exception class names that are ignored.

writableStackTraceEnabled.description: Whether CallNotPermittedException has a writable stack trace.

baseConfig.description: Name of a shared configuration to inherit from.
